sourceText: Fossils are invaluable records of past life.
translatedText: Kasusuwan kasusuwan tarihi ne masu kima na rayuwar da ta gabata.

sourceText: Suggests that through the study of fossils, one can understand past ecosystems and life forms, which is essential for understanding the evolution of present-day life.
translatedText: Yana ba da shawarar cewa ta hanyar nazarin burbushin halittu, mutum zai iya fahimtar halittun da suka gabata da sifofin rayuwa, waɗanda ke da mahimmanci don fahimtar juyin halittar rayuwar yau.

sourceText: Political pressure and opposition from rivals in establishing and maintaining her rule as a woman. Difficulty in securing legitimacy.
translatedText: Matsi na siyasa da adawa daga abokan hamayya wajen tabbatar da mulkinta a matsayinta na mace. Wahala wajen tabbatar da halaccinta.

sourceText: Presented herself in male pharaonic iconography and emphasized her father's designation as successor to solidify her claim. Led Egypt to prosperity through successful foreign trade and massive construction projects, gaining popular support and proving the legitimacy of her reign.
translatedText: Ta gabatar da kanta cikin hoton fir'auna na maza kuma ta jaddada nadin mahaifinta a matsayin magaji don tabbatar da da'awarta. Ya jagoranci Masar ta samu ci gaba ta hanyar cin nasarar kasuwancin waje da manyan ayyukan gine-gine, da samun goyon bayan jama'a da tabbatar da halaccin mulkinta.
Karni na 16-15 BC Giant (1507 BC ~ 1458 BC)

sourceText: Justice is the path all people follow, and truth is like a star that shines eternally.
translatedText: Adalci ita ce hanyar da dukan mutane suke bi, kuma gaskiya kamar tauraro ne da ke haskakawa har abada.

sourceText: This means that only righteous rule and truthful words can earn the trust of the people and be judged by history.
translatedText: Wannan yana nufin mulki na adalci da maganganun gaskiya ne kawai za su iya samun amincewar mutane kuma tarihi ya yi masa hukunci.

sourceText: My soul is rooted in the divine, and my reign is founded upon justice.
translatedText: Raina ya kafe cikin allahntaka, mulkina kuma yana bisa adalci.

sourceText: This statement emphasizes that her rule aligns with the will of the gods and is based on fairness.
translatedText: Wannan magana tana jaddada cewa mulkinta ya yi daidai da nufin alloli kuma yana kan adalci.

sourceText: Nothing is impossible. It is only the will to achieve it that is lacking.
translatedText: Ba abun da ba ze yiwu ba. Nufin cimma shi ne kawai ya rasa.

sourceText: This implies that with strong will and determination, any difficulty can be overcome and goals achieved.
translatedText: Wannan yana nuna cewa tare da ƙarfi da himma, ana iya shawo kan kowace wahala da cimma burin.

sourceText: The solitude of pursuing philosophy amidst political turmoil and the frustration with societal ignorance.
translatedText: Keɓewar bin falsafa a cikin rudanin siyasa da takaicin jahilcin al'umma.

sourceText: Through detachment from society, he deeply explored inner wisdom and discovered 'Logos', the immutable truth within a changing world.
translatedText: Ta hanyar keɓancewa daga al'umma, ya bincika hikimar ciki sosai kuma ya gano 'Logos', gaskiyar da ba ta canzawa a cikin duniya mai canzawa.
Karni na 6-5 BC Giant (535 BC ~ 475 BC)

sourceText: You cannot step into the same river twice.
translatedText: Ba za ku iya shiga cikin kogi ɗaya sau biyu ba.
